    • AngularConfigMap

    Interface AngularConfigMap

    interface AngularConfigMap {
        $anchorScroll?: AnchorScrollConfig;
        $aria?: Partial<AriaConfig>;
        $compile?: CompileConfig;
        $cookie?: CookieConfig;
        $eventBus?: EventBusConfig;
        $exceptionHandler?: ExceptionHandlerConfig;
        $htmlCanvas?: HtmlCanvasConfig;
        $http?: HttpConfig;
        $interpolate?: InterpolateConfig;
        $location?: LocationConfig;
        $log?: LogConfig;
        $rest?: RestConfig;
        $router?: RouterConfig;
        $sce?: SceConfig;
        $sceDelegate?: SceDelegateConfig;
        $security?: SecurityConfig;
        $sse?: SseModuleConfig;
        $templateCache?: TemplateCacheConfig;
        $templateRequest?: TemplateRequestConfig;
        $webComponent?: WebComponentConfig;
        $websocket?: WebSocketModuleConfig;
        $webTransport?: WebTransportModuleConfig;
    }
